attached_docs: KFM GitHub Repository Documentation Implementation Agent v3.1

validation_gates.reason: Verified repository identity and admin permission, default-branch base 1f6b4f867091f819969360f7d5187fcb41e39604, target file and blob, issue-intake authority boundary, correction contract and runbook, release-notice lane, security routing, CODEOWNERS, receipt schema, and absence of overlapping open work.

Preserved the original affected claim/release, problem, supporting evidence, and correction-lineage obligations while adding stale-versus-wrong classification, EvidenceRef-to-EvidenceBundle resolution, source-role review, containment, derivative impact, review duties, validation, and governed correction outcomes.

Parsed front matter with name/about/title/labels/assignees, verified balanced comments and code fences, final newline, ordered section inventory, empty unverified labels, and assignment to verified repository owner bartytime4life.

The template routes security-sensitive material to SECURITY.md, requires public-safe evidence pointers and generalized locations, prohibits restricted payloads, and distinguishes issue intake from correction, policy, release, supersession, withdrawal, and rollback authority.

The final template preserves prior release inspectability, requires evidence support or abstention/denial, records derivative closure, separates correction notices from release state, names rollback targets, and uses finite acceptance outcomes.
Computed SHA-256 f07ec5eb8cfa3c118eb641bd5a3ce51cedabc93ebef00205a64f85bd1edaabd5 and Git blob SHA 04799f74ce0c234c1f8b839184b14410140459ea; GitHub returned the same blob SHA after the update.
The template is not yet on the default branch. Issue chooser rendering, project automation, repository issue settings, and required-review enforcement remain NEEDS VERIFICATION after merge.

notes: AI-authored revision of the public evidence-correction issue template on a scoped review branch. The artifact structures intake and triage only. It does not confirm that a published object is wrong, create a CorrectionNotice, approve policy, change release state, issue a supersession or withdrawal, authorize rollback, or complete correction. Human review remains pending.
